description_long: This is a modern drip coffee machine with a matte black exterior and a compact, rectangular form. The main body features a prominent control panel on the left side, including a vertical row of buttons and a rotary dial, as well as a visible indicator light. The coffee pot is made of transparent glass with a black handle and a decorative white dot pattern, sitting on a recessed warming plate beneath the brewing head. The top surface is ribbed, likely for aesthetic and grip purposes, and the front has a subtle handle for accessing the filter compartment. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, with smooth, rounded edges and a sturdy base. The machine appears suitable for countertop use in kitchens, offices, or communal urban spaces.
description: A sleek, matte black drip coffee machine with a glass carafe, side control panel, and ribbed top surface. Features a modern, compact design with smooth edges and a decorative carafe.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main body, subtle handle for the filter compartment, and the ribbed top surface.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the control panel with buttons and dial, as well as the full glass carafe with handle and decorative pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the carafe and the recessed area beneath the brewing head.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the carafe and the smooth, uninterrupted side of the machine.
attribute_brand_logo: A small hexagonal logo is visible on the left side of the machine, below the control panel. The logo appears white on a dark background, but the brand name is not legible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the left side, featuring a row of three buttons with icons or text, a rotary dial at the bottom, and a small indicator light above the dial.
